hero.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
hero.tagline: Building scalable distributed systems and crafting delightful user experiences.
about.title: About Me
about.p1: Senior Full-Stack Engineer with 8+ years of experience building high-scale distributed systems, microservices architectures, and modern web applications. Passionate about Clean Architecture, Domain-Driven Design, and delivering software that makes a real impact.
about.p2: I've contributed to systems serving 200+ distribution centers at AmbevTech, built B2B e-commerce platforms used across Latin America, and architected multi-microservice backends with event-driven patterns. I thrive at the intersection of backend robustness and frontend elegance.
